title: Maintainability
description:
Evaluates how easily the system can be modified to correct errors, improve functionalities, or adapt to changes.
[ul]
[b]Modularity[/b]: independent components.
[b]Reusability[/b]: parts can be reused.
[b]Analyzability[/b]: easy to diagnose and assess impacts.
[b]Modifiability[/b]: easy to change without causing problems.
[b]Testability[/b]: easy to test.[/ul]
